entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the crop affected by stem rot

entities.name: STEM ROT
entities.description: A disease caused by Sclerotium rolfsii that targets the crown region of groundnut

entities.name: SCLEROTIUM ROLFSII
entities.description: The soil-borne pathogen that causes stem rot in groundnut

entities.name: UNITED STATES
entities.description: A region where stem rot has a significant adverse impact on groundnut

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A region where stem rot has a significant adverse impact on groundnut

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: A region where stem rot has a significant adverse impact on groundnut

entities.name: YIELD LOSS
entities.description: Reduction in groundnut production resulting from stem rot infection

entities.name: FIELD-BASED PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of observing and measuring traits in the field

entities.name: SICK FIELD SCREENING
entities.description: A field-based phenotyping method used to evaluate disease resistance

entities.name: OXALIC ACID ASSAY
entities.description: A laboratory-based screening method used as a supplement to field phenotyping for stem rot resistance

entities.name: STEM ROT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut genotypes to resist infection by Sclerotium rolfsii

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation in stem rot resistance attributable to genetic factors

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL INFLUENCE
entities.description: The effect of external environmental factors on the expression of stem rot resistance
